hotel_name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel & Suites Houston by the Galleria

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
When I arrived, there was no one at the registration desk and I had to wait 30 minutes for a receptionist to arrive.
I was given a room, and after I lay down to sleep, I realized that ther were big blood stains both on the top of the comforter and on the sheets. That was disgusting. I went down to ask to change the room, again there was no one at the desk and I had to wait for 40 minutes. 
At the same time, I got an email from my credit card saying that the hotel tried to charge me $300 which my credit card declined as fraud and then I was charged $150 for incidentals.
I left the hotel at around 4 am. Then hotel charged me $643.91 even though I paid for the hotel fully through 3rd party long ago and I confirmed with the hotel about this.

reviews.title: Total experience was terrible, staff lied to me about everything!
reviews.positives: Nothing really
reviews.negatives: Everything. The lies from check in at front desk to being humiliated by going up to the restaurant for breakfast and being declined because it wasn’t included in my package to being told parking was $25 and being charged $35. This is outrageous. So many guests complaining at your front desk. Experience was definitely 2 out of 10

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Horrible experience trouble getting the correct room that was booked very rude staff would not recommend
reviews.room_type: 2 QUEEN 1 BEDROOM SUITE - SOFA BED IN LIVING

reviews.title: Acceptable

reviews.title: Looks okay from the outside, but run down inside
reviews.text:
Room was very dated and could use an upgrade. Low value for money considering the condition. 

Cons:
Hand soap and basic toilet goods not provided. 
Safety deposit box was not attached to anything and could topple over and crush your foot. 
Elevators were under maintenance and took very long to arrive. 
Housekeeping did not come by one day and asking for coffee supplies to be replenished took almost 2 hours.

reviews.title: Bad

reviews.title: Ordinary n old hotel
reviews.text: Management need to have empathy towards overseas guests wrt putting water bottles n adapter in d room. Thanks

reviews.title: Not pleaseant at all. I do not recommend this hotel to any one
reviews.positives: The location is good
reviews.negatives: The room was not clean. They did not have trolleys to carry my bags to the room. There was hair everywhere. The bathroom drainages are extremely old. All room curtains are dirty with big stains. The room did not have drinking water at all. The carpet is old and smelly. The restaurant where they served breakfast did not have clean tables to use. On top of the that, I did not get my breakfast I ordered due to miscommunication between restaurant staff.  I have reported all of this to the assistant manager and he tried his best to  rectify some of these issues.

reviews.title: Above average

Very old Hotel with old furniture. 
There much better options with the same price range

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Upon arrival I got told that I had no room as they were double booked. I am still waiting to receive a full refund. I have followed up about the refund but received no response.

reviews.title: Great location, unimpressive facilities
reviews.text:
The room was a decent discount from posted rates, that's as nice as it was going to get.
Our room wreaked of smoke, the additional parking fee was not made clear, and exorbitant wifi fee. Who charges for wifi? I get free WiFi at the gas station, the year is 2020, not 1920. Nobody is amazed by your telegraph machine, catch up Hilton. I would and will stay somewhere else, if I'm paying for wifi and parking I'm not really saving anything am I?

reviews.title: Thumbs Down!!

Service was great but surprised their garage keeps separate records. They charged us twice for the parking and it's not even as close as we thought to the Galleria.

reviews.title: Great Location, not a great place
reviews.text:
The entrance, the elevators, the room passage, all smelled like mariguana. Room besides us had a dog barking the whole night. Bathroom flooded while we were out. 

Aside from having a great location, I believe there's better alternatives.

reviews.title: It was a terrible experience.
reviews.positives: The cookies were the only thing enjoyable during the stay
reviews.negatives: We found a roach, when reporting we seen a roach the staff member laughed at us asking where we were from and that we must be spoiled because that was only a medium size roach. The sheets were changed. while we were gone, however when we finally turned the lights on the comforter was filthy dirt on it, stains as if someone had eaten in the bed and grabbed the comforter, along with some other stains on the comforter. The headboard was dirty and there was a piece of fake eyelashes on the shower all that I have pictures of. The manager attempted to give a food credit. Going to dine at Quarters was terrible we sent the food back with me not getting anything else. There was no one in the restuarant only 1 waitress and 1 other staff member. The food took forever to come out and when it did the salmon was so hard and dry as if it was cooked a few days ago and just nooked and place on top of my salad. The crab cakes were horrible and cold. The manager Julian gave us hilton honor points for the issue with the roach which we did

reviews.title: Not worth the money, Holiday INN would be a much better stay.
reviews.positives: the bed
reviews.negatives: Self Parking, no elevators for parking but don't even bother to book at this location. Elevators 4 but only 2 are usable, staffed but not well trained, their room card system was down, couldnt get a digital key even after 4pm and i was checked in, didn't have the room i asked for on the Hilton App, Hotel smelled like skunk was in the building. One of the bar staff didn't know how to make me a cold shot of Don Julio. He was giving me a glass of ice lol.  Breakfast no bueno. Don't get the free breakfast. Needs Updating up grading, obviously not spending money on training or new equipment. I wish i could had cancelled and gone to another hotel but it was non refundable and i purchased it same day. Awful, not worth $222 i paid for 1 night. Luckily i didn't book to stay longer.

reviews.title: Not exceptional hotel. But not bad either.
reviews.text: WiFi is extremely expensive and hardly works. This is a real rip off and far below standards. Use of WiFi should be included in room rate and work properly.

reviews.title: Will never come again
reviews.negatives: No room service, no help with luggage, horrible parking without elevator. No help with luggage, no luggage carts, rooms are outdated. Staff is rude and unprofessional. They need better training, multiple staff told us multiple conflicting rules. They never answer the phone. When they do answer the phone they put you on hold for 20-30 minutes then hang up in your face. Don’t ask to speak to manager because that will lead to you getting hung up on as well. The whole hotel probably should go out of business

reviews.title: Decent .

Myself & my wife had no choice but to head back to our home state because we didn’t have much of a choice . The balcony had a cup of cigarettes and a faulty door. The shower head was also rusty with a calcium ridden head.

reviews.title: Overall, my stay was disappointing due to maintenance issues and poor communication.
reviews.positives: They charge $35 per day for parking, but there weren’t enough spaces available. One night, I had to park on the street due to the lack of availability.
reviews.negatives: The building has four elevators, but only one was working on the day we arrived. My room was on the 18th floor, and we ended up waiting over 30 minutes just to get upstairs. Eventually, an employee offered to take us up using the service elevator. When I brought this up at the front desk, they claimed they weren’t aware of the situation, which was surprising, considering the large crowd of guests visibly waiting around for the elevator. It’s unclear how long this had been going on, but it was clearly a major inconvenience. Fortunately, the elevators were fixed the next day. The room also had a damp, musty smell, like wet carpet, and there was no exhaust fan in the bathroom.

reviews.title: Great Hospitality During a Difficult Trip, but Billing Issue Was Disappointing
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives:
Our family had a very stressful travel experience—our flight was cancelled, and we ended up stranded in Nashville. We had to drive 11 hours to get to Houston and finally arrived at the DoubleTree Hilton Galleria. Throughout the ordeal, we stayed in contact with the property and were reassured that our reservation had been modified to reflect a two-night stay instead of the original dates.

Upon arrival, the staff was warm, understanding, and compassionate, which we truly appreciated after such a long and exhausting trip. The check-in process was smooth, and we felt welcomed and taken care of.

However, the experience took a turn at check-out. While I was initially charged for two nights as agreed, I later noticed that my account was billed for three nights—an extra night that was not part of my modified reservation. When I called to inquire, I was met with a frustrating response. The tone shifted, and it felt like the staff was blaming me for the discrepancy. They also seemed to disregard the fact that the reservation had been clearly modified in advance.

It was disappointing to end an otherwise decent stay on that note. I sincerely hope this issue can be resolved and that the extra charge is refunded. While the service during check-in was excellent, the handling of the billing issue after check-out left a lot to reconsider regarding the overall stay.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: What truly stood out to me was the young man who welcomed us at the hotel entrance—warm, personable, and full of helpful information. We were in town for a funeral, and while dining in the restaurant, he took the time to stop by and chat with our family. That thoughtful gesture meant a lot and genuinely lifted our spirits. The suite was fantastic, and we appreciated the amenities, especially the convenience of dining in the restaurant and ordering room service.
reviews.negatives: I have nothing to note about the hotel itself—we simply didn’t have the opportunity to explore the surrounding area during our stay.

reviews.title: Will not stay there again
reviews.positives: Valet personnel were so friendly and tried to accommodate the best they could,Self parking  personnel Priscilla was very nice and answered any questions we had. Cookies were great!
reviews.negatives:
Had a frustrating and scary experience at this Hilton. First, there were only three hotel bell carts for 26 floors—completely insufficient. On top of that, no one informed us that the elevators were malfunctioning.

I got on an elevator with seven other people, only for it to get stuck. We pressed the emergency button multiple times, and no one responded. I had to call the front desk myself, and instead of immediate action, I was asked, "What color is the elevator on the inside?"—as if that was the priority. I repeatedly told the staff it was Elevator 1, yet there was no urgency at all.

Meanwhile, a little girl was crying because we were trapped with zero help in sight. Eventually, we had to pry the elevator doors open ourselves and climb out, as the elevator had stopped unevenly between floors.

I went straight to the front desk, visibly shaken, and spoke to a manager (dark hair, glasses—never got her name). I explained my frustration and fear, expecting at least some kind of empathy. Instead, all I got was a simple "sorry" and an employee escorting me to my room. No real concern, no compassion—not even a cookie! (Because, let’s be honest, Hilton is known for those.)

Honestly, I expected much better from Hilton. This situation could have been handled with more urgency, empathy, and professionalism. Do better, Hilton.

reviews.title: I wont stay here again
reviews.positives: I loved how friendly the staff was. The hotel was extremely nice.
reviews.negatives: Our first day there we did not have hot water and then next day the power went out. We didn’t have water for a while after that. For the price to stay at this hotel we should not have experienced anything bad! A pilot said they stay here often and something is always wrong

reviews.title: We were out of town celebrating a birthday and all of the guests were uncomfortable
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Roaches were in my rooms and my six other friends rooms. When brought to the attention of the manager n duty (Pinky) she was rude and told us we could leave if we wanted to. She offered nothing for our inconvenience. We were also told n arrival that we could be placed on the same floor with thee group members if we would wait. We waited and still didn’t get accomadate as promised

reviews.title: Stylish and Comfy
reviews.positives: Awesome location in the city around restaurants for ANY budget. The service was amazing, the cookies were delicious and warm...(that's a bonus), was not able to hear my neighbors. Overall a great stay! This was probably my 6th time staying here and I cannot remember having complaints.
reviews.negatives: Parking price.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Breakfast was excellent and location was great
reviews.negatives: Front desk charged us three times for the room and management has yet to reimburse us. If you pay in full online do not let them charge you on site and try to convince you that you haven’t been billed. Very unprofessional experience from the front desk.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The beds were really comfortable
reviews.negatives: The place is overdue for a renovation, everything is a little old. The room service is way overpriced and the food arrived cold.

reviews.title: It was excellent and I can’t wait to come back!
reviews.positives: I loved everything about the property but I especially loved the room set up!! The manager Will was amazing!! He greeted me with a smile and when I checked out he greeted me with a smile! He was the best!  Everyone at the front desk was amazing!
reviews.negatives: I do not have any complaints!

reviews.title: Could have been better, not worth what I spent.
reviews.positives: The staff was incredibly friendly, patient, and went above and beyond when it came to customer service. The lobby was nice enough for the price.
reviews.negatives: Very disappointing trying to check in, while i wasnt promised that we could check in early we arrived early and were not able to get into our room. That was fine, what was stressful and upsetting was that our room was not ready and would not be ready until after 4pm. That is ridiculous, we pay for less than 24 hours in a room and were being robbed of time we PAID for. We were offered another "better" suite, but I ended up sleeping on the pullout which was 0/5 stars and NOT what I paid for. Management was fully aware of the influx of people coming in for the concert and had plenty of time to prepare. Being told that nothing could be done was offensive especially after the price paid for one night. Thankfully, the staff redeemed this incident with their patience and kindness and they deserve endless praise. People at the exec and managerial level should be prepared, and frankly should do better. Re-evaluate the prices or offer better service.

reviews.title: We enjoyed the stay.  The location was excellent.  We have no complaints.
reviews.positives: When I searched online for information concerning parking, I could not find any information.
reviews.negatives: Please explain in detail hour to get out of the parking lot with the scanner.  It was a little confusing.

Not knowing the reason being was because of the fact that they didn’t have any more 1 bedroom kings ..   We had to stay sleep on the a i believe a queen size… when my husband is absolutely is a big guy.

reviews.title: thank you for the hospitality it was a pleasure staying with Double Tree :)
reviews.positives: a well kept property, the staff was very nice and helpful. the location of the hotel is perfect and a walk away from a variety of cool spots.
reviews.negatives: the vending machine gave me a busted soda! had a good laugh about it wasn’t very upset!
